gyms.name: Vanilla
gyms.subtitle: Classic Alea
gyms.description: Standard rules — rerolls give a new random number (1–6). All powers and level limits as usual.

gyms.name: Step Up
gyms.subtitle: Ordered rerolls
gyms.description: Same as Vanilla, but rerolls bump the die by 1 (1→2→…→6→1) instead of rolling random.

gyms.name: Safari Snap
gyms.subtitle: 3-2-1 · one die
gyms.description: Every 3rd reroll: 3-2-1 countdown, then one random unlocked die gets a new number. Locked dice are skipped.

gyms.name: Safari Surge
gyms.subtitle: 3-2-1 · all dice
gyms.description: Every 3rd reroll: 3-2-1 countdown, then every unlocked die gets a new number. Locked dice stay put.

gyms.name: Tight Loadout
gyms.subtitle: 2 power slots
gyms.description: Same rules as Vanilla, but you can only hold 2 powers at once instead of 3.

gyms.name: Head Start
gyms.subtitle: Middle row straight
gyms.description: The center row starts locked as 1-2-3-4-5 (a straight). Clear the other four rows to win each level.
